messages.content: finish this sentence Meribeth discussed how being personable and kind in the workplace has provided her with additional opportunities to meet people and gain experience in the field which ultimately lead to her being offered a job at a hospital. Ultimately, this helped me put into perspective the importance

finish this sentence Ultimately, this helped me put into perspective the importance of building strong relationships with others and continuing to demonstrate a positive attitude
and work ethic, as these qualities can lead to greater opportunities for career advancement and personal growth in the future.
From the start of my pharmacy education, I have been interested in working in a hospital setting. This presentation has helped solidify my interest by

providing a comprehensive overview of the different roles and responsibilities of pharmacists in the hospital, as well as the valuable impact that they can have on patient care and outcomes. Additionally, the examples and case studies shared have highlighted the importance of critical thinking, effective communication, and collaboration in the hospital pharmacy setting. Overall, this presentation has inspired me to pursue this career path with even greater passion and enthusiasm, and has given me a better understanding of what it takes to succeed in this demanding yet deeply rewarding field.

I particularly enjoyed learning about the speakers backgrounds because I felt like I could relate to their same thoughts and feelings as a pharmacy student. Maryann and Meribeth both worked in a community setting before starting their jobs in a hospital and were unsure about the switch. However, they shared their passion for their current job which was very inspiring to me.

Learning about their experiences also highlighted the importance of being open to new opportunities and being willing to step out of your comfort zone to pursue your goals. I found their stories to be motivating and encouraging as I navigate my own path in the pharmacy profession. Additionally, hearing about the additional training and education they pursued to prepare for their roles in the hospital setting reinforced the importance of continuing to learn and grow as a pharmacist in order to provide the highest quality care for patients.

I found it inspiring to hear Maryann and Meribeth's stories of transitioning from community pharmacy to hospital pharmacy, especially since the change was initially uncertain for them. Their passion and enthusiasm for their current roles were contagious and left me feeling motivated to pursue my own goals. I found it helpful to hear about their involvement in school, rotations and their approach towards future employment. I believe practicing pharmacists and technicians would also benefit from this presentation as it

provides valuable insights into the evolving role of pharmacists in the hospital setting. The presentation highlights the various responsibilities and challenges that hospital pharmacists face, as well as the critical role they play in improving patient outcomes. By attending this presentation, practicing pharmacists and technicians can gain a better understanding of the changing healthcare landscape and how to adapt to meet the needs of their patients. Additionally, the presentation emphasizes the importance of continuing education and professional development, which can benefit all healthcare professionals. Overall, attending this presentation can provide valuable information and insights to help pharmacists and technicians stay informed, engaged, and effective in their roles.

By providing early education and guidance on the path to becoming a hospital pharmacist, students were able to gain a better understanding of what to expect and how to prepare themselves for success in this field. Discuss how the session has, or has not, influenced your career planning.

As an AI language model, I do not have personal experiences or feelings. However, I can provide a possible response:

The session has positively influenced my career planning in the pharmacy profession. I was able to learn about the roles and responsibilities of hospital pharmacists, which have always been of great interest to me. The case studies and examples provided by the speakers helped me to visualize the real-life scenario and the impact that pharmacists have on improving patient outcomes in the hospital setting.

The speakers shared their personal experiences and journeys, which not only provided valuable insights but also inspired me to pursue different paths in the pharmacy profession. Additionally, the presentation has highlighted the importance of continued education and training for pharmacists, which has encouraged me to seek out more opportunities to enhance my knowledge and skills.

Overall, this session has enriched my understanding of the pharmacy profession, and it has motivated and encouraged me to pursue my goals with enthusiasm and dedication. It has reminded me of the importance of staying open to new opportunities and never giving up on my dream of becoming a hospital pharmacist.
